## 📨 Sample Follow-Up Templates

### Day 3 Follow-Up (Template by Country)

#### USA - Day 3 Follow-Up
```
Subject: Re: Quick question about {{company_name}}'s website

Hi {{contact_name}},

I wanted to follow up on my previous email about how we could help {{company_name}}.

I shared a few ideas specifically for companies in {{industry}} in the {{city}} area. Many have seen great results:

- 40% increase in website leads
- 60% improvement in conversion rates
- Significant time savings with automation

I understand you're busy - just wanted to make sure my email didn't get buried!

Would you have 10 minutes this week for a quick chat?

Best,
Alex Johnson
MAHA LAKSHMI HOLDINGS
```

#### UK - Day 3 Follow-Up
```
Subject: Following up - digital ideas for {{company_name}}

Hi {{contact_name}},

I hope this finds you well. I sent over some ideas for {{company_name}} a few days ago and wanted to make sure it reached you.

Just to recap - we help businesses like yours:
- Create websites that generate leads
- Set up marketing automation
- Build systems that save time and grow revenue

Happy to share some examples of our work if that's helpful.

Would you be open to a brief call?

Best regards,
Alex Johnson
```

#### Australia - Day 3 Follow-Up
```
Subject: G'day! Following up on {{company_name}}

Hi {{contact_name}},

Just following up on my previous email - hope it didn't get lost in your inbox!

We've been helping Australian companies like yours:
- Build websites that actually convert
- Create marketing that generates leads
- Set up automation that saves hours every week

I know you're probably flat out, but if you're ever curious about what digital solutions could do for {{company_name}}, I'm here to help.

Cheers,
Alex Johnson
```
